steps.title: Use the triangle sum
steps.content:
The interior angles of a triangle add to
$$180^\circ$$

steps.title: Substitute the given angles
steps.content:
Substitute the given angle measures for angle $D$ and angle $E$.
$$62^\circ+90^\circ+F=180^\circ$$

steps.title: Solve for the missing angle
steps.content:
Combine the known angles, then subtract from the triangle total.
$$152^\circ+F=180^\circ$$
$$F=28^\circ$$
The answer is A.
